title: HTML Layout Editor
text: HTML Layout Editor The HTML Layout Editor enables you to create the layout of dynamic and static server page components. The HTML Layout Editor is a basic source editor and does not provide a WYSIWYG preview or editing mode. Shortcut Menu Command Action Insert from Resource Browser Inserts snippet selected in the Resource Browser into the layout. Copy Copies the selected code to the Clipboard. Paste Pastes text from the Clipboard into the layout. The text can be: The HTML created by the Copy as HTML action in the Structure tab of the Resource Browser The contents of a snippet selected in the Snippets tab of the Resource Browser Any other text that is currently on the Clipboard Related Links Layout A layout defines the way data is arranged, formatted, and styled for presentation to the user, either on screen or in print.
